Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No one is using it. It might be[n]because exams are coming up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sound of splashing is coming[n]from the pool. The club members[n]seem to be practicing hard...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This door leads to the swimming pool.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The swim team seems to be using the pool.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a note that says, "Sorry, but the swim[n]team is no longer recruiting new members."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This door leads to the swimming pool.[n]The swim team uses it after school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A faint scent of chlorine[n]wafts through the air...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This door leads to the swimming pool.[n]The swim team uses it after school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It must feel great to swim here[n]during the hot summer days...[n]{f 1 1}
